title: bubonium daltonii
intro: Bubonium daltonii, also known as the Australian finger lime, is a species of flowering plant in the citrus family, Rutaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and limonoids. The Australian finger lime has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and inflammation, due to its health benefits such as antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Bubonium daltonii include juice, essential oil, and extracts, which can be used in traditional medicine and as a flavoring agent in food and beverages.
